What We Do

Services

Custom Characters · Animated Commercials · Jingles · Songs — all built for you, delivered in 48 hours.
One-Off
Quick Wish
$25

Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries & congrats moments.

  • 15-second personalized animation
  • Custom character built from your photo
  • Short voiceover & jingle included
  • No watermarks — all yours
  • 48-hour turnaround

One-Off
Custom Birthday Song
$35

A fully personalized song made just for them.

  • 30-second custom song (name, message, upbeat vibe)
  • Personalized lyrics + full production
  • Full use — raw files/master stay NOD Factor
  • Want the master? +$200 one-time
  • 48-hour turnaround

🔥 Most Popular · Month 1
Kickoff Package
$250

Launch your brand story with a full animated commercial & custom jingle.

  • 1-minute animated commercial (scene + voiceover)
  • Custom jingle — full rights to use anywhere
  • Main character built from your photo
  • Intro storyline crafted for your brand
  • No watermarks
  • 48-hour turnaround
Start Your Story
Monthly Subscription
Keep It Going
$99/month after kickoff

New episode every month — your story keeps building.

  • New 1-minute episode each month
  • Continues your brand storyline
  • One new character added (or reuse free)
  • Extra characters: $40 each (one-time, yours forever)
  • All videos + jingle — no watermarks
  • NOD Factor credit in every video
  • 48-hour turnaround
